medical_history.chief_complaint: Metastatic Renal CA, cycle 2, week 1 of HD Il-2.
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Mr. ___ was admitted for cycle 1 week 1 of High Dose IL-2 with response from cycle 1 of therapy. His history began when he was found to have three masses in his pancreas almost replacing his body of the pancreas in ___. He had MRI of abdomen on ___ revealing at least five masses in the body of the pancreas measuring 0.8 mm to 2.6 cm. Also, he has a left subcutaneous lower back mass measuring 2.2 x 3 cm. On ___, he underwent biopsy of left shoulder soft tissue mass and left flank soft tissue mass revealing metastatic renal cell carcinoma. He received cycle 1 of therapy in ___ with dramatic decrease in soft tissue masses and other systemic lesions. He is ready to begin cycle 2 of therapy after undergoing head CT, torso CT for restaging.
medical_history.past_medical_history: CAD ___, 99% stenosis of right coronary artery and he was stented at that time. Renal cell carcinoma resected ___ BPH.
medical_history.family_history: Significant for sister with renal cell carcinoma diagnosed one year ago, clear cell, grade ___. Father has horseshoe kidneys, but without malignancy and had MI at the age of ___. Mother alive and well. Otherwise, no cancer in the family.

physical_examination.general_examination: Well-appearing gentleman, not in acute distress, accompanied by wife. ECOG 0: Clear oropharynx without oral mucosal lesions. Atraumatic, anicteric. Neck: Supple without JV or thyromegaly or masses. Chest: Clear to auscultation and percussion bilaterally, without wheezes or rhonchi. Heart: Regular rate and rhythm, S1, S2 present and were intense, without murmurs, rubs or gallops. Abdomen: Soft, nontender. Bowel sounds are present in all four quadrants, without hepatosplenomegaly or masses. Lymph Nodes: There is no palpable cervical, supraclavicular, axillary or inguinal lymphadenopathy bilaterally. Skin: difficult to appreciate soft tissue nodules.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Neurological: There is no focal deficit on brief CNS exam. Alert and oriented x3 and fluent in language.
